# Sequence sorting

Optional reordering operations applied to the sequence.

Registry: ``praxis.SORTING_REGISTRY`` (3 entries)

## `native` - NativeSort

Sorting mechanism that uses torch.sort() to sort the feature dimension of the input.

Source: [praxis/sorting/native.py:6](../praxis/sorting/native.py#L6)

## `none` - NoSort

Base class for sorting mechanisms. This implementation does not perform any sorting.

Source: [praxis/sorting/base.py:7](../praxis/sorting/base.py#L7)

## `sinkhorn` - SinkhornSort

Sorting mechanism using a differentiable approximation based on optimal transport.

Source: [praxis/sorting/sinkhorn.py:6](../praxis/sorting/sinkhorn.py#L6)
